alerts.title: MRT-3 Limited Service
alerts.description: Due to ongoing maintenance work, MRT-3 is operating with reduced frequency between North Avenue and Quezon Avenue stations. Expect 5-10 minute delays during peak hours.

alerts.title: LRT-1 Carriedo Station Closure
alerts.description: Carriedo Station is temporarily closed for elevator repairs and platform maintenance. Passengers may use nearby United Nations or Central Terminal stations as alternatives.

alerts.title: EDSA Carousel Express Service
alerts.description: New express stops have been added during peak hours (7-9 AM, 5-7 PM) to improve service. Limited stops at major terminals only.

alerts.title: LRT-2 Weekend Schedule Change
alerts.description: Modified weekend operating hours. Service starts at 5:30 AM instead of 5:00 AM on Saturdays and Sundays.
